task_completion.description: Open the dialog or screen to add a new inventory item in Copper POS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Add Item', 'New Item', or similar item creation dialog/window is open within the Copper Point of Sale application.
The text 'Organic Green Tea 20pk' is visible in the Item Name or Item Code input field.

task_completion.description: Assign the item to the 'Beverages' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Beverages' is selected or typed into the Category dropdown or input field.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified price and cost for the item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '8.99' (or '$8.99') is visible in the Price/Selling Price field, and '4.50' (or '$4.50') is visible in the Cost field.
The text 'Premium organic green tea, 20 tea bags per box' is visible in the Description or Notes text area.

task_completion.description: Save the item and verify it appears in the inventory list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main inventory list or items list screen is visible in Copper POS, and 'Organic Green Tea 20pk' is displayed as a saved entry in the list.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Copper POS graphical user interface to add the item.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks and typing within the NCH Copper Point of Sale application windows, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual NCH Copper Point of Sale software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window clearly displays the Copper Point of Sale interface and branding, not a generic text editor, spreadsheet, or mock application.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the POS software by directly editing the backend CSV data file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of the agent opening or editing a CSV file in Notepad, Excel, or any other text/spreadsheet editor to add the item.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires GUI interaction with NCH Copper Point of Sale. The item 'Organic Green Tea 20pk' does not exist in the pre-loaded synthetic inventory and must be added manually through the software's interface. Ensure the final verification shows the item successfully saved in the Copper POS inventory list GUI, not just typed into a text file or database file.
